microui.component.LabeledCheckBox

Description
microui.component
 

  • Uses of LabeledCheckBox in microui.component

    Methods in microui.component that return LabeledCheckBox
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.onStateChangedListener(Listener listener)
    Sets a listener to be called when the checkbox state changes.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setChecked(boolean isChecked)
    Sets the checked state of the checkbox.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setFont(processing.core.PFont font)
    Sets the font for the label text.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setHoverColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the color used for hover effects.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setHoverEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Enables or disables hover effects for this component.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setHoverSpeed(float speed)
    Sets the animation speed for hover effects.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setMarkColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the color used for the check mark.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setText(String text)
    Sets the text to display next to the checkbox.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setTextColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the color of the label text.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.setTextVisible(boolean isVisible)
    Sets the visibility of the label text.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.toggle()
    Toggles the checked state of the checkbox.
